memory.summary: I'm skipping the assignment to eat with cohort_3; my friends matter way more than finishing work right now.

desires: Stay with cohort_3 and keep the conversation flowing because my friends are my entire world right now.
Ignore the looming assignment deadline to avoid breaking the momentum of our lunch together.
Get a quick dopamine hit from socializing rather than forcing myself to focus on 'soft' work when I'm already tired.
Feel like the loyal teammate who prioritizes people over tasks, even if it means looking unreliable later.

goals.description: Immediately join cohort_3 for lunch and commit to staying until the conversation naturally winds down.
goals.rationale: Relationships (0.5 weight) are my absolute priority right now. The impulse to socialize overrides the soft assignment deadline. I need to be the loyal friend who shows up, not the robot who checks a task list.

goals.description: Actively steer the lunch conversation to ensure everyone feels included and energized.
goals.rationale: My assertiveness score is high; I will take charge of the social dynamic to maintain that 'momentum' we're talking about. It's better to be the loud, fun person than the quiet worker right now.

goals.description: Defer all work on the assignment analysis and reading until after the meal and potentially later tonight.
goals.rationale: The deadline is at 18:00, which feels far away in my short planning horizon. Forcing focus now would ruin the dopamine hit from socializing. I'll deal with the 'soft' work when the immediate emotional need is met.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances 'relationships' (0.5 weight) by joining cohort_3 immediately. My assertiveness and impulse drive me to seize this social momentum now, ignoring the soft assignment deadline which feels distant in my short planning horizon.
